intent: On Reddit, find a post with an image in r/pics, extract the image URL and the post title

eval_fallback.criteria: The output must include a post title that is a plausible Reddit post title and an image URL that is a valid URL starting with 'https://' and pointing to an image host (e.g., i.redd.it, preview.redd.it, i.imgur.com, external-preview.redd.it, or similar).
